Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0xC100 "MRWIMPY-C100" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Mr Wimpy.prg"
Metadata.Notes:
This is a BASIC game with the main program being loaded at $0801. Therefore an init routine has been added at $C100 which: 1. Sets up the correct VICII settings and necessary BASIC pointers to start the game program after the initial loading instructions 2. Executes the RUN command
Note: the init routine was placed at $C100 as the BASIC program uses memory at $C000. To dump the game, set a breakpoint at $4000.
The loading screen is from the Spectrum version.
